trigger.effect: discover X where X is greatest power among attacking artifact creatures

avoidCards.name: Herald's Horn
avoidCards.reason: Creature subtype only (not all artifact creatures); redundant with Sculptor/Inspector; ~5-6 cards per type in mixed lists

scoringCeiling.note: Discover engine cards score low on artifacts slug; do not cut them for analyzer offTheme warnings alone

categoryPitfalls.ramp: Nature's Lore, Three Visits, Farseek, Birds of Paradise, Arcane Signet often null or non-ramp primary — use Sol Ring, Mind Stone, Cultivate, Kodama's Reach, artifact rocks
